jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Voylla
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
